landing.title: Welcome to Ontic Strip
landing.heroTitle: Spot how sources cover the same stories
landing.heroDescription: We surface signals from across the web so you can spot coverage gaps and compare publisher integrity.
landing.errorBanner: Live statistics are temporarily unavailable. Refresh the page to try again.
landing.blindspotDescription: Stories with concentrated coverage expose gaps in how the rest of the media covers the same topic.

collect.title: Collect
collect.description: Ingest feeds, documents, and publisher metadata in real time.

analyze.title: Analyze
analyze.description: Score documents for grounding and integrity with a consistent strip model.

compare.title: Compare
compare.description: Surface publisher contrasts so you can judge coverage imbalances quickly.

claimSearch.title: Claim Search
claimSearch.description: Search across all extracted claims from analyzed articles
claimSearch.minChars: Type at least 3 characters to search.

trendingClaims.title: Trending Claims
trendingClaims.description: Claims extracted and analyzed from this week's articles
trendingClaims.noClaimsAll: No claims from this week yet.

leaderboard.title: Publisher Leaderboard
leaderboard.description: Publishers ranked by evidence-backed reporting quality

publishers.title: Publishers
publishers.description: Integrity and grounding baselines across {{count}} sources
publishers.noPublishersYetHint: Publishers appear once you add RSS feeds.

publisherDetail.ideologyMapHint: Each dot is one article. Axes range from −10 to +10.

compare.title: Compare Publishers
compare.description: Select up to 3 publishers to compare their integrity metrics side by side
compare.selectToStart: Select publishers above to start comparing
compare.publishersAvailable: Choose from {{count}} publishers with baseline data
compare.ideologyComparisonHint: Average ideological position per publisher on economic and social axes.

admin.title: Feed Management
admin.description: Configure RSS sources for the pipeline
admin.removeFeedDescription: This will delete the feed and stop collecting new articles. Existing articles will remain.

documentDetail.copiedToClipboard: Full analysis JSON copied to clipboard
documentDetail.stripCellHint: Click any strip cell to jump directly to its claims and evidence.
documentDetail.scoresDisclaimer: Scores reflect alignment between extracted claims and retrieved evidence at analysis time — they are statistical signals, not editorial or legal determinations.
documentDetail.noSegments: No segments yet. Document needs indexing.
documentDetail.noContent: No content available yet. Pipeline status: {{status}}
documentDetail.relatedArticlesHint: Other articles covering the same story
